overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character with a bow exploring a snowy canyon at night. The character walks across a fallen log bridge, approaches a waterfall, and swims downstream through the canyon waters while the camera reveals towering cliff walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy canyon floor with scattered boulders and stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy canyon terrain toward a fallen log bridge spanning the water

entered.detail: tall rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall rock face forming the right boundary of the canyon
snow-dusted earth and rocks covering the canyon floor
large fallen tree trunk lying across the stream serving as a bridge
leafless dead trees scattered throughout the canyon
narrow flow of water running through the canyon bottom

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy canyon at night, surrounded by towering rock walls and scattered dead trees. The ground is covered in snow and patches of grass, with a small stream running through the center. A fallen log lies ahead spanning the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: log bridge over canyon pool at waterfall base

events.description: character steps onto and carefully crosses the fallen log bridge over the water

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the fallen log bridge, maintaining balance while approaching the waterfall

entered.detail: cascading water falling down the rock face into the pool below
deeper water pool at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the fallen log bridge over the canyon stream. As she progresses, a waterfall comes into view in the distance, feeding into a pool below. The snow-covered ground gives way to the wooden log surface underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river flowing through rocky canyon

events.description: character enters the water, transitioning from wading to swimming downstream

agents.ego_description: wading into the river and beginning to swim downstream away from the waterfall, navigating between rocks

entered.detail: boulders protruding from the water surface creating obstacles

segments.scene_description: The character enters the water at the base of the waterfall and begins swimming downstream through the canyon river. Large rocks protrude from the water, and the waterfall recedes into the background as she moves deeper into the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep canyon river with towering vertical walls

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the towering height of the canyon walls and night sky above

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily downstream while the camera pans up to reveal the immense scale of the surrounding cliff walls

entered.detail: night sky visible through the gap between towering canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The character continues swimming through the deeper waters of the canyon river. The camera pans upward to reveal the towering vertical cliff walls rising into the night sky, emphasizing the enclosed nature of the canyon. The environment is dark and atmospheric with the water reflecting the dim light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow snowy canyon at night that transitions from a terrestrial trek into a downstream swim. It begins with the character navigating a snowy path between towering rock walls and dead trees, moving toward a fallen log that spans a small central stream. As she crosses the wooden bridge, the terrain opens up to reveal a distant waterfall feeding into a pool below. The scene then shifts as the character enters the water at the base of the falls, swimming downstream past protruding rocks while the waterfall recedes into the background. Finally, the camera pans upward from the dark, reflective river to reveal the immense vertical cliff walls rising into the night sky, emphasizing the enclosed atmosphere of the canyon.
